sentences.target: Le comité arrive dans cinq minutes.

translations.fr: Le comité arrive dans cinq minutes.
translations.en: The committee arrives in five minutes.
translations.es: El comité llega en cinco minutos.
translations.de: Der Ausschuss kommt in fünf Minuten.
translations.it: Il comitato arriva tra cinque minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 委员会将在五分钟后到达。
translations.yue: 委員會會喺五分鐘後到達。
translations.pt: O comitê chega em cinco minutos.
translations.vi: Ủy ban sẽ đến trong năm phút nữa.
translations.nl: De commissie komt over vijf minuten.
translations.hu: A bizottság öt perc múlva érkezik.
translations.el: Η επιτροπή φτάνει σε πέντε λεπτά.
translations.id: Komite akan tiba dalam lima menit.
translations.ja: 委員会は5分後に到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determines the noun 'comité' as a specific entity.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb 'arrive'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'comité' and expresses an intransitive action.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('cinq minutes').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes' to indicate quantity.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'dans' indicating duration.

sentences.target: Nous présentons le comité aux parents.

translations.fr: Nous présentons le comité aux parents.
translations.en: We introduce the committee to the parents.
translations.es: Presentamos el comité a los padres.
translations.de: Wir stellen den Eltern den Ausschuss vor.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们向家长介绍委员会。
translations.yue: 我哋向家長介紹委員會。
translations.he: אנחנו מציגים את הוועדה בפני ההורים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi giới thiệu ủy ban với các phụ huynh.
translations.nl: We stellen de commissie aan de ouders voor.
translations.hi: हम माता-पिता को समिति से मिलवाते हैं.
translations.id: Kami memperkenalkan komite kepada para orang tua.
translations.ja: 私たちは保護者に委員会を紹介します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; marks the agent performing the action.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb taking a direct object ('le comité') and an indirect object ('aux parents').
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'comité' as a specific entity.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'présentons'.
Preposition contracted with the plural definite article ('à' + 'les'); introduces the indirect object 'parents'.
Common noun, masculine plural; indirect object (recipients) governed by 'aux'.

sentences.target: Tu contactes le comité par mail.

translations.fr: Tu contactes le comité par mail.
translations.en: You contact the committee by email.
translations.es: Contactas al comité por correo electrónico.
translations.de: Du kontaktierst den Ausschuss per E-Mail.
translations.zh-Hans: 你通过电子邮件联系委员会。
translations.ru: Вы связываетесь с комитетом по электронной почте.
translations.pt: Você entra em contato com o comitê por e-mail.
translations.he: אתה יוצר קשר עם הוועדה במייל.
translations.vi: Bạn liên hệ với ủy ban qua email.
translations.ar: أنت تتواصل مع اللجنة عبر البريد الإلكتروني.
translations.nl: Je neemt per e-mail contact op met de commissie.
translations.uk: Ви зв'язуєтеся з комітетом електронною поштою.
translations.hi: आप ईमेल के जरिए समिति से संपर्क करते हैं.
translations.el: Επικοινωνείς με την επιτροπή μέσω email.
translations.ja: メールで委員会に連絡します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal); marks the agent.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb with direct object 'le comité' and prepositional complement 'par mail'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'comité'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'contactes'.
Preposition expressing the means or medium.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'par' indicating the communication medium.

sentences.target: Ils créent un comité pour le festival.
sentences.reading: /il kʁe œ̃ kɔ.mi.te puʁ lə fɛs.ti.val/

translations.fr: Ils créent un comité pour le festival.
translations.ipa: /il kʁe œ̃ kɔ.mi.te puʁ lə fɛs.ti.val/
translations.en: They are creating a committee for the festival.
translations.es: Están creando un comité para el festival.
translations.de: Sie gründen einen Ausschuss für das Festival.
translations.it: Stanno creando un comitato per il festival.
translations.ko: 그들은 축제를 위해 위원회를 만들고 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在为节日成立一个委员会。
translations.yue: 佢哋為節日成立一個委員會。
translations.pt: Eles estão criando um comitê para o festival.
translations.vi: Họ đang lập một ủy ban cho lễ hội.
translations.nl: Ze richten een commissie op voor het festival.
translations.hu: Egy bizottságot hoznak létre a fesztiválhoz.
translations.hi: वे त्योहार के लिए एक समिति बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Δημιουργούν μια επιτροπή για το φεστιβάλ.
translations.nb: De oppretter en komité for festivalen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang membentuk sebuah komite untuk festival tersebut.
translations.sv: De skapar en kommitté för festivalen.
translations.ro: Ei creează un comitet pentru festival.
translations.da: De opretter et udvalg til festivalen.
translations.ja: 彼らは祭りのために委員会を作っています.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); marks the agent.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive verb taking 'un comité' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'créent'.
Preposition introducing a purpose or beneficiary ('le festival').
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'festival'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' indicating the event.
